name: CONTRACT-BACKLOG-13
title: workspace-map.py legacy positional form (repo-root, human, audit) undocumented in usage help
description: scripts/workspace-map.py supports a legacy positional form (line 122) for callers but the -h/--help output (line 164) only documents the flag-based interface. Either deprecate and remove the legacy form, or include it in help output.
